## Source: amazon-inspector (bcb3aafc860058ba4e9a64c6fa7dba85b7df72d68971ef7c673245e4ac02820f)

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (1139816aec09701aa03df7d77ec7cde1f0d119ecd358a6417dc28ad0f53cd99c)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'expeewas' @ 1.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
